note: Attribute gates apply to SOME skills — the high-tier band (levelReq 3+). Tier I–II abilities stay ungated so entry/mid play is open. To LEARN a gated ability the character needs its governing sub-attribute >= learnMin; to reach RANK 3 needs >= rank3Min. Sub-attributes cap 20/area (soft-cap knee 4), so gates cannot all be cleared — attribute investment is the tradeoff. Framework: what you can wield reflects who you've become. Mechanic ratified by Erik 2026-07-06 ('attribute gates for some skills'); per-ability selection + values authored by Aevi (PO). Tunable.
